synopsis: Little Bear was learning to skate for the first time. With the guidance of expert skaters Little Squirrel and Little Rabbit, he quickly mastered the forward and backward skating techniques. Later, Little Badger suggested that Little Rabbit perform a figure skating show. Little Rabbit's skillful and graceful movements stunned Little Bear, and even experts like Little Squirrel and Little Badger were full of praise. Suddenly, Little Rabbit, while leaping from the air, broke through the ice and fell into a hole. Just as Little Squirrel and Little Bear pulled Little Rabbit out of the hole, Little Bear slipped and knocked Little Squirrel back into the ice. Little Badger quickly jumped in to rescue Little Rabbit, but due to his poor swimming skills, Little Rabbit and Little Squirrel both sank to the bottom. Little Badger quickly told Little Bear to run and find help. Little Red Duck, leading the skiing competition, heard Little Bear's cries for help and immediately stopped the race. Resolutely abandoning his sure win, Little Duck went to the scene and rescued his friend.
